description:
A unique tool to improve safe removal for USB and SATA gadgets

Have you ever lost important data due to inappropriate removal of external drive? Windows doesn't allow you to stop a device? Accidentally stopped a drive you don’t aim to remove? USB Safely Remove solves these and other inconveniences of safe removal in Windows and offers much more features for convenient and secure work with external devices.
Key Features:
Much more convenience: Safely remove a device via the convenient menu or a hotkey, remove unneeded devices from the menu, setup icons or names for the devices. Besides even if you stop a device accidentally you can return it in a click.
Save data and devices: Even if the device cannot be safely removed the program will show you locking processes and allow you to forcibly stop it so that you avoid incorrect removal of the device. Besides the program can power off the devices on their stopping.
Automate and speed up work: Use command line tool in your scripts or a powerful autorun manager to automate backup to external drives, check for viruses and many more daily tasks.
Organize drive letters: Clean up your drive letter list by automatic hiding letters of unused card reader slots, fix drive letters to a specific device or even forbid some letters from assigning to external drives for backup purposes or thirdparty software.
This is a minor but important update that includes improvements to device detection, card reader handling, and various bug fixes.

Improvements
- On uninstallation the program activates back all the disabled devices
- Japanese language added, some other languages were updated
- Removed unnecessary text files from the installation package, rewritten readme.txt
Bug fix
- Error could happen when you reorder items in the list of services (Settings -> Device Stop tab)
- Unneeded disabled devices could be displayed
- Some types of card readers couldn’t be appropriately detected or stopped
- BitLocker encrypted card reader cards were hid when “Hide drive letters” option is enabled
- The “Device is going to be disabled” message could be displayed inappropriately
How to update from the previous version?
Just download and install the required installer over the previous version. You do not need to uninstall the previous version. If your license upgrade period is over, feel free to purchase the renewal.
Note! We have recently renewed the code signing certificate, it still hasn’t gain the required reputation so Windows will display you the Smart Screen dialog. Don’t worry, just click “More” link and press “Run Anyway”
